topic: A person correctly using a French Press to brew coffee, countertop view.

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Top-down countertop view; a single person’s hands scoop medium-ground coffee into the glass carafe of the French press.
Scene 2 — Action (2-5s): Side view; hot water pours into the carafe, then a brief stir with a spoon as the grounds steep.
Scene 3 — Close (5-8s): Macro/side view; the plunger is pressed smoothly downward, and coffee flows into a mug on the counter.
parsed_generation.narration: Brewing with a French press highlights the coffee's full-bodied oils and aroma. The ritual from grounds to plunge rewards patient attention with a richer cup. A simple countertop moment that emphasizes precision and care.
